description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a friendly green dragon. Its body is covered in a textured, knitted green fabric with a lighter orange patch on its belly and paw pads, and it features large, floppy ears and a rounded snout. The dragon has two small, black button-like eyes and a pair of orange horns on its head, with a larger central horn and two smaller side horns. Its back is adorned with a pair of small, orange and green wings and a long, textured tail. The toy's limbs are short and rounded, with orange paw prints on the feet, and the overall appearance is soft and cuddly. The stitching and fabric details give it a hand-crafted, whimsical look suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or play areas.
description: A soft, green dragon stuffed toy with orange accents, floppy ears, button eyes, and small wings. It has a textured, hand-crafted appearance and a friendly, whimsical design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dragon's face, large ears, button eyes, orange horns, and orange belly patch with both front paws visible.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlights the dragon's profile, one visible wing, the curve of its tail, and the side of its head and body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both wings, the full length of the tail, and the back texture of the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side-rear view shows the other wing, the tail, and the side of the head and body, with one paw partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large, round black eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a gentle and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is sitting upright with its legs spread forward, arms resting at its sides, and head facing forward. Its wings and tail are positioned naturally behind the body.
